    Editor in Chief

    Dr. Marvin Whiteley

    Editor in Chief (2030) | Georg= ia Institute of Technology

    Marvin Whiteley is a Regent=E2=80=99s professor, Georgia Research Allian= ce Eminent Scholar, and the Bennie H. and Nelson D. Abell Chair in Molecula= r and Cellular Biology at Georgia Tech, Atlanta, Georgia.

    Latest mBio Podcast Episode

    =20
    • Phage with a Twist: Discovery of J= S1 and Rethinking the Architecture of Bacteriophage Tails
      April 29, 2026
      Phage JS1, a bacteriopha= ge that challenges long-standing assumptions about phage structure. Bacteri= ophages, or phages, are viruses that infect bacteria and are typically clas= sified based on the structure of their tails. In this study, the authors de= scribe a phage isolated from wastewater that infects multiple species of St= aphylococcus and has a tail that is both curved and contractile, a morpholo= gy that does not fit classical phage categories. The conversation explores = how this phage was discovered, why studying non-aureus staphylococci matter= s, and how structural biology revealed unexpected flexibility in the phage = tail. They also discuss how this unusual structure may help the phage navig= ate thick bacterial cell walls and what this means for phage evolution, cla= ssification, and potential therapeutic applications. Even in well-studied s= ystems like bacteriophages, biology continues to reveal unexpected complexi= ty.

Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: https://journals.asm.org/pb-assets/styles/Journals-Atypon-1759393761550.css @charset "utf-8"; span.leaderboard-label { font-size: 10px; display: block; transform-origin:= 0px 0px; transform: rotate(90deg); position: absolute; } .boombox-wrapper { margin: 30px 0px; } span.boombox-label { font-size: 10px; text-align: center; display: block; m= ax-width: 300px; } #gs-casa-c { width: 80px !important; } #gs-casa-b { width: 70px !important; } h3.trendmd-widget-header__heading { font-size: 18px !important; font-family= : Montserrat, sans-serif !important; } .article-footer-element { margin: 0px auto; max-width: 888px; } @media (min-width: 1173px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 4vw; max-width: 700px; } } @media (min-width: 1401px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 11vw; max-width: 729px; } } @media (min-width: 1920px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 22vw; } } .sections-navbar__toggle { font-size: 1.8rem; background: rgb(112, 112, 112= ) !important; padding: 0.5rem !important; } .sections-navbar__toggle i.icon-list { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .loi__item__cover img { border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); } #supplementary-materials [role=3D"listitem"] { position: initial; } .journals-list img { border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); } @media (max-width: 767px) { [data-widget-def~=3D"ux3-layout-widget"] > .container, [data-widget-def~= =3D"ux3-layout-widget"] .container:first-child { margin-right: 15px; margin= -left: 15px; } } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .card-2__thumb { padding-top: 59% !important; background-size: contain; } } @media (min-width: 532px) { .header--generic .header__hero { background: rgb(246, 245, 245); color: r= gb(0, 0, 0); } .header--generic .header__hero::after { background: rgb(246, 245, 245); } .header--generic .header__hero > .container { padding-left: 0px; padding-= right: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } } .related-tabs li.tab__nav__item:nth-child(2) { display: none; } .sections-navbar__subtitle { display: none; } .lp__box { position: relative; min-height: 150px; } .lp__box__content { width: 70%; } .card-link { position: absolute; inset: 0px; } .card-link:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .mt-10 { margin-top: 10px !important; } .mt-15 { margin-top: 15px !important; } .mt-20 { margin-top: 20px !important; } .mt-30 { margin-top: 30px !important; } .mb-10 { margin-bottom: 10px !important; } .mb-15 { margin-bottom: 15px !important; } .mb-20 { margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .mb-30 { margin-bottom: 30px !important; } .ac-nav a { color: rgb(21, 84, 178); text-decoration: none; } .ac-nav a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ac-nav-left { list-style: none; padding: 0px; margin: 10px 0px 30px; } .ac-nav-left > li { margin-bottom: 10px; padding-left: 15px; font-size: 15p= x; } .ac-nav-left-sub > li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .ac-resources { border-top: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); border-bottom: 2p= x solid rgb(204, 204, 204); padding: 20px 15px; font-size: 14px; } .ac-resources li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .ac-nav-left-sub { list-style: none; margin: 10px 0px 20px; padding: 0px 0p= x 0px 20px; font-size: 13px; } .ac-nav-item.active, .ac-nav-item.open { position: relative; } .ac-nav-item > .ac-nav-left-sub { display: none; } .ac-nav-item.open > .ac-nav-left-sub { display: block; } .ac-nav-item.active > a, .ac-nav-item.open > a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-= weight: bold; } .ac-nav-left > .ac-nav-item.open::before { content: ""; width: 6px; height:= 6px; display: block; background: rgb(183, 32, 42); position: absolute; lef= t: 0px; top: 7px; } .check-btn label { display: inline-block; } .check-btn input { display: none; } .check-btn input:checked ~ .menu-toggle { display: block; } @media (min-width: 1024px) { .check-btn label { display: none; } } @media (max-width: 1023px) { .menu-toggle { display: none; } } .lp__box__icon { background: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .pb-dropzone-mode .pb-widget > .pb-hover-toolbar { top: 0px; } .contact-wrapper p { width: 46%; padding-right: 20px; display: inline-block= ; vertical-align: top; } @media (max-width: 767px) { .contact-wrapper p { width: 100%; padding-right: 0px; } } .text-left { text-align: left !important; } .text-right { text-align: right !important; } .text-center { text-align: center !important; } .ed-3col p { width: 31%; min-width: 270px; padding-right: 1.4em; display: i= nline-block; vertical-align: top; } .ed-4col p { width: 22%; min-width: 200px; padding-right: 1em; display: inl= ine-block; vertical-align: top; } .ed-3col p em, .ed-4col p em { color: rgb(112, 112, 112); } @media (max-width: 991px) { .ed-3col p, .ed-4col p { width: 47%; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .ed-3col p, .ed-4col p { width: 100%; } } .blockquote { margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 1.25rem; } .blockquote-footer { display: block; font-size: 80%; color: rgb(108, 117, 1= 25); } .blockquote-footer::before { content: "=E2=80=94=C2=A0"; } .list-unstyled { padding-left: 0px; list-style: none; } .div-1 { background-color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .rounded-sm { border-radius: 0.2rem !important; } .rounded { border-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-top { border-top-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-top-right= -radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-right { border-top-right-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bottom= -right-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-bottom { border-bottom-right-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bo= ttom-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-left { border-top-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bottom-l= eft-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-lg { border-radius: 0.3rem !important; } .rounded-circle { border-radius: 50% !important; } .rounded-pill { border-radius: 50rem !important; } .rounded-0 { border-radius: 0px !important; } .lead { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 300; } .text-lowercase { position: static !important; } footer a img { margin: 0px; } .article-section__inline-figure figure { width: 100%; float: none; } .accordion__content { display: block !important; } .actionsbar__has__sections, .publication__menu { display: none; } .article__content { display: inline; } footer, header { height: 0.625rem; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; display: none= ; } header 178); } .do-link--gray:hover, .do-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .do-link--gray { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgb(112, 112, 112); } .do-link--standalone { font-family: Montserrat, 768px) { .do-headline { font-size: 1.5rem; } } @media (min-width: 1024px) { .do-headline { font-size: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 1023px) { .g2-container--md { width: 100%; } } .do-dark-bg { } } .blur-bg { filter: blur(0.125rem); } .do-overlay::after { content: " "; display: block; position: absolute; inse= t: 0px; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgb(0, 0, 0)); } .do-btn, url("../fonts/montserrat-regular-webfont-8= b300481357985ec520179f91c17e787.woff") format("woff"); } body { font-family: Montserrat, "Montserrat Subset", sans-serif; font-size:= 1rem; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250); line-height: 1.4; overflow-wra= p: break-word; min-height: 100vh; overflow-x: hidden; } .content { padding-bottom: 0.9375rem; } .fixed-element { position: sticky; z-index: 5; top: 8.125rem; } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .fixed-element { top: 5.625rem; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .fixed-element { top: 3.5rem; } } .fixed-element.header { z-index: 10; } .page__content { padding: 3rem 0px 3.5rem; } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .page__content { padding: 2.625rem 0px 0px; } } .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 2.5rem; padding-left: 2.5rem; } @media (max-width: 1023px) and (min-width: 768px) { .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 1.25rem; padding-left: 1.25rem; } } @media (max-width: 1023px) and (min-width: 768px) { .padding-wrapper-tablet { padding-right: 2.5rem; padding-left: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 0px; padding-left: 0px; } } .dark-secondary-color { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .lock-screen, .modal-open, .noscroll { overflow: hidden; } .lock-screen.iOS, .modal-open.iOS, .noscroll.iOS { max-width: 100%; width: = 100%; } .shift-up-content { position: relative; top: -2.5rem; } .full-width { width: 100%; } .no-margin { margin: 0px; } .styled-link { font-weight: 700; text-decoration: underline; color: rgb(183= , 19, 42); font-size: 0.75rem; } .general-link { text-decoration: underline; color: rgb(21, 84, 178); } .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; } .lowercase { text-transform: lowercase; } .capitalize { text-transform: capitalize; } .transformLess { text-transform: none !important; } .align_center, .text-center { text-align: center; } .text-sm { font-size: 0.875rem; } .text-xs { font-size: 0.75rem; } .underline { text-decoration: underline; } .bold { font-weight: 700; } .weight-500 { font-weight: 500; } .weight-800 { font-weight: 800; } .inline-block { display: inline-block; } .inline { display: inline; } hr.divider { display: block; height: 0.0625rem; border-width: 0.0625rem 0px= 0px; border-style: solid none none; border-color: rgb(217, 217, 217) curre= ntcolor currentcolor; border-image: initial; margin: 1rem 0px; padding: 0px= ; } .secondary-container { width: 100%; margin: 0px auto; } @media (min-width: 1280px) { .secondary-container { max-width: 1280px; } } .sticky { position: sticky; top: 0px; } .no-pointer-events { pointer-events: none; } .hidden-text { color: transparent; } .not-visible { visibility: hidden; } .title--secondary { color: rgb(183, 19, 42); text-transform: uppercase; } .visibility-hidden { visibility: hidden; position: absolute; left: -999em; = } .sr-only, .sr-only-focusable { position: absolute; width: 0.0625rem; height= : 0.0625rem; padding: 0px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, text-decoration: underline !important; text-transform: none !important;= } .sr-only-focusable:hover { opacity: 0.9; } a { cursor: pointer; } a, a:focus, a:hover { color: inherit; text-decoration: display: flex; -webkit-box-orient= : vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; max-heig= ht: 100%; max-width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 16px; margin: 0= px auto; overflow: hidden auto; font-size: 1.3rem; color: rgb(3, 3, 3); bac= kground-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-width: medium; border-style: none= ; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; } .dialog.modern-dialog { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px 0px 24px 12px; = } .dialog.rounded-container { border-radius: 12px; } .dialog.modern-dialog-layout { padding: 0px; border-radius: 24px; } .dialog-body { overflow: hidden auto; max-height: 100vh; } .dialog.scrollable .dialog-body { overflow: visible; max-height: unset; } .dialog-container { position: fixed; inset: 0px; display: flex; -webkit-box= -align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-cont= ent: center; z-index: 4; } .dialog-header { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-d= irection: normal; flex-direction: column; } .dialog-buttons, .dialog-header { flex-shrink: 0; } .dialog-buttons { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: ce= nter; -webkit-box-pack: end; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 12px; } .dialog-buttons > * { margin-left: 8px; } .dialog-buttons > :first-child { margin-left: 0px; } .dialog-flex-button { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .dialog-flex-button .button-with-icon.compact { margin: 0px; } .dialog-body a, .dialog-header a { color: rgb(6, 95, 212); } .dialog-body ytm-menu-item a { color: currentcolor; } @media (min-width: 330px) and (min-height: 330px) { .dialog { min-width: 250px; max-width: 356px; } .dialog-container { margin: 0px 40px; padding: 0 env(safe-area-inset-righ= t) env(safe-area-inset-bottom) env(safe-area-inset-left); } } .dialog-fullscreen { min-width: 100%; min-height: 100%; margin: 0px; paddin= g: 0px; height: 1px; } .dialog-fullscreen > .dialog-body { height: 100%; } .dialog.modern-dialog-layout.dialog-fullscreen { border-radius: 0px; } .dialog-container.dialog-fullscreen { margin: 0px; } c3-toast { display: block; position: fixed; z-index: 5; left: 0px; right: 0= px; bottom: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 14px 24px; font-size: 1.4= rem; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(15, 15, 15); will-change: t= ransform; margin-bottom: -100%; } c3-toast.hug-toast { max-width: 344px; } c3-toast.inverse-theme { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(3, 3, 3= ); } c3-toast.inverse-theme .button-with-icon { color: rgb(6, 95, 212); } [has-safe-area-in-max=3D"true"] c3-toast { padding: 14px max(24px,env(safe-= area-inset-right)) 14px max(24px,env(safe-area-inset-left)); } [has-pivot-bar=3D"true"] c3-toast { --safe-area-inset-top: env(safe-area-in= set-top); --safe-area-inset-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); bottom: ca= lc(48px + var(--safe-area-inset-bottom)); margin-bottom: calc(-100% + var(-= -safe-area-inset-bottom)); z-index: 2; } [modal-open-body] c3-toast, [shorts-player=3D"true"] c3-toast { bottom: 8px= ; margin-bottom: -100%; z-index: 5; } c3-toast[dir=3D"out"] { transition: margin 195ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)= ; } c3-toast[dir=3D"in"] { transition: margin 225ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);= margin-bottom: 0px; } @-webkit-keyframes spinner {=20 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } @keyframes spinner {=20 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } .spinnerWrapper { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: ce= nter; } .spinner { display: block; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 12px auto; width= : 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border-width: 2px; border-style: = solid; border-color: rgb(102, 102, 102) rgb(238, 238, 238) rgb(238, 238, 23= 8); border-image: initial; animation: 0.8s linear 0s infinite normal none r= unning spinner; } .spinner > .hidden { display: none; } .spinner:not([hidden]) { https://www.youtube.com/s/player/5b27766f/www-player.css @charset "utf-8"; .html5-video-player { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overfl= ow: hidden; z-index: 0; outline: 0px; font-family: "YouTube Noto", Roboto, = Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color: rgb(238, 238, 238); text-align: left; = direction: ltr; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.3; -webkit-font-smoothing: = antialiased; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); touch-action: m= anipulation; } .html5-video-player, .ytp-contextmenu { forced-color-adjust: none; } .html5-video-player.ad-showing, .html5-video-player.ended-mode, .html5-vide= o-player.unstarted-mode, .html5-video-player:not(.ytp-transparent) { backgr= ound-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .ytd-video-masthead-ad-primary-video-renderer .html5-video-player.ad-showin= g, .ytd-video-masthead-ad-primary-video-renderer .html5-video-player.ended-= mode, .ytd-video-masthead-ad-primary-video-renderer .html5-video-player.uns= tarted-mode, .ytd-video-masthead-ad-primary-video-renderer .html5-video-pla= yer:not(.ytp-transparent) { background-color: transparent; } .ytp-big-mode { font-size: 17px; } .ytp-autohide { cursor: none; } .html5-video-player a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transition: = color 0.1s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: 0px; } .html5-video-player a:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transition: color = 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1); } .ytp-probably-keyboard-focus a:focus { box-shadow: rgba(27, 127, 204, 0.8) = 0px 0px 0px 2px inset; } .html5-video-player h1, .html5-video-player h2 { margin: 0px; } .html5-video-player svg { pointer-events: none; } .html5-video-player:not(.ytp-touch-mode) ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px;= background-color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .ytp-big-mode:not(.ytp-touch-mode) ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 15px; } .html5-video-player:not(.ytp-touch-mode) ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { backgr= ound-color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .html5-video-player:not(.ytp-touch-mode) ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { backgr= ound-color: rgb(142, 142, 142); border: 1px solid rgb(66, 66, 66); border-r= adius: 5px; } .ytp-big-mode:not(.ytp-touch-mode) ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { border-radiu= s: 8px; } .html5-video-container { z-index: 10; position: relative; } .ytp-embed-error .html5-video-container { display: none; } .html5-main-video { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; h= eight: 100%; outline: 0px; } .ytp-fit-cover-video .html5-main-video { object-fit: cover; } .html5-main-video[data-no-fullscreen=3D"true"]::-webkit-media-controls-full= screen-button { display: none; } .html5-main-video:not([controls])::-webkit-media-controls, .html5-main-vide= o:not([controls])::-webkit-media-controls-start-playback-button { display: = none; } .html5-main-video::-webkit-media-controls-timeline { display: inline; } .unstarted-mode
